TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-sowing_Kainu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: e kalanaymu tikay ku nanu' a kinqianuxniam lawwi gi.
S.PHON: e kalanajmu tikaj ku nanuʔ a kinqianuxniam lawwi ɣi.
S.FORM: e kalanaymu tikay ku nanu' a kinqianuxniam lawwi gi.
S.PHON: e kalanajmu tikaj ku nanuʔ a kinqianuxniam lawwi ɣi.

TRANSL.notes: 讓我再說一些(過去的)生活.

S.TRANSL: 讓我再說一些 生活.

TRANSL.notes: Let me talk a little about the life (in the past) again.

S.TRANSL: Let me talk a little about the life again.

S.FORM: sawni ga ini'mu u naqarani kumal gi kia tikay uwi na' tiku salun mha u.
S.PHON: s~ɕawni ɣa iniʔmu u naqarani kumal ɣi kia tikaj uwi naʔ tiku s~ɕalun mħa u.
S.FORM: sawni ga ini'mu u naqarani kumal gi kia tikay uwi na' tiku salun mha u.
S.PHON: s~ɕawni ɣa iniʔmu u naqarani kumal ɣi kia tikaj uwi naʔ tiku s~ɕalun mħa u.
S.TRANSL: 今天,我還沒講完,還有一些應該要講.
Today, I have not finished talking, and there is still a little that should be talked about.

S.FORM: e tumuvux hani ga asiki pakaavagan la ga.
S.PHON: e tumu*ux ħani ɣa as~ɕiki pakaa*aɣan la ɣa.
S.FORM: e tumuvux hani ga asiki pakaavagan la ga.
S.PHON: e tumu*ux ħani ɣa as~ɕiki pakaa*aɣan la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 播種這件事情應該是在將要夏天的時候.
Sowing this thing should be at the time when summer is coming.

S.FORM: mana'aring kia tumuvux la.
S.PHON: manaʔariŋ kia tumu*ux la.
S.FORM: mana'aring kia tumuvux la.
S.PHON: manaʔariŋ kia tumu*ux la.
S.TRANSL: 那時開始播種.
Then sowing begins.

S.FORM: tumuvux ru kia ku pansapungan nku navakis sunga' mha u maquwas ku qavahaniq mha u tutut tutut la maga yani vay la ku a anaringan i tumuvux.
S.PHON: tumu*ux ru kia ku pans~ɕapuŋan nku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ mħa u maquwas~ɕ ku qa*aħaniq mħa u tutut tutut la maɣa jani *aj la ku a anariŋan i tumu*ux.
S.FORM: tumuvux ru kia ku pansapungan nku navakis sunga' mha u maquwas ku qavahaniq mha u tutut tutut la maga yani vay la ku a anaringan i tumuvux.
S.PHON: tumu*ux ru kia ku pans~ɕapuŋan nku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ mħa u maquwas~ɕ ku qa*aħaniq mħa u tutut tutut la maɣa jani *aj la ku a anariŋan i tumu*ux.
S.TRANSL: 播種,然後以前老人有規定,說當鳥叫的時候,這個時候正是開始播種的時候.
Sowing and there are regulations of old men in the past, saying when the birds chirp, this is exactly the time to begin sowing.

S.FORM: ru panapusan i mha tutut la ku tutut vay ga la ga asi vay ki tumuvux ana i.
S.PHON: ru panapus~ɕan i mħa tutut la ku tutut *aj ɣa la ɣa as~ɕi *aj ki tumu*ux ana i.
S.FORM: ru panapusan i mha tutut la ku tutut vay ga la ga asi vay ki tumuvux ana i.
S.PHON: ru panapus~ɕan i mħa tutut la ku tutut *aj ɣa la ɣa as~ɕi *aj ki tumu*ux ana i.
S.TRANSL: 然後鳥叫第二次的時候,真的必須無論如何都要播種了.

TRANSL.notes: And when the birds chirp the again, (they) should sow no matter what.

S.TRANSL: And when the birds chirp the again, should sow no matter what.

S.FORM: tiku vavuyqa sunga' ga mutux nha' panangun uwi ru.
S.PHON: tiku *a*ujqa s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa mutux nħaʔ panaŋun uwi ru.
S.FORM: tiku vavuyqa sunga' ga mutux nha' panangun uwi ru.
S.PHON: tiku *a*ujqa s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa mutux nħaʔ panaŋun uwi ru.
S.TRANSL: 他們過去也開墾竹子林.
They also plowed bamboo forests in the past.

S.FORM: e mamati' tuvuxan ga asiki maymaw i ma'uva' a rawiq i musa' i e tumuvux gi mamati' gi vali i kinhiwan na nanu' na asi panangi kia ru.
S.PHON: e mamatiʔ tu*uxan ɣa as~ɕiki majmaw i maʔu*aʔ a rawiq i mus~ɕaʔ i e tumu*ux ɣi mamatiʔ ɣi *ali i kinħiwan na nanuʔ na as~ɕi panaŋi kia ru.
S.FORM: e mamati' tuvuxan ga asiki maymaw i ma'uva' a rawiq i musa' i e tumuvux gi mamati' gi vali i kinhiwan na nanu' na asi panangi kia ru.
S.PHON: e mamatiʔ tu*uxan ɣa as~ɕiki majmaw i maʔu*aʔ a rawiq i mus~ɕaʔ i e tumu*ux ɣi mamatiʔ ɣi *ali i kinħiwan na nanuʔ na as~ɕi panaŋi kia ru.

TRANSL.notes: 播種困難到要(做)到翻白眼的程度.去播種很難因為(他們)沒有什麼可以用來挖,那時就直接(徒手)開墾.

S.TRANSL: 播種困難到要 到翻白眼的程度.去播種很難因為 沒有什麼可以用來挖,那時就直接 開墾.

TRANSL.notes: Sowing was so hard that they must (do it) to the degree of rolling their eyes. Going sowing was hard because (they) did not dig with anything then but they still plowed.

S.TRANSL: Sowing was so hard that they must to the degree of rolling their eyes. Going sowing was hard because did not dig with anything then but they still plowed.

S.FORM: a silawm la ru tumuvux la.
S.PHON: a s~ɕilawm la ru tumu*ux la.
S.FORM: a silawm la ru tumuvux la.
S.PHON: a s~ɕilawm la ru tumu*ux la.
S.TRANSL: 燒完之後就播種.
Burning and then sowing.

S.FORM: tumuvux ku la ga mutux nha' sikaal sku navakis mha u halanay tikay i i pana'aring i sumi'atu' gi.
S.PHON: tumu*ux ku la ɣa mutux nħaʔ s~ɕikaal s~ɕku na*akis~ɕ mħa u ħalanaj tikaj i i panaʔariŋ i s~ɕumiʔatuʔ ɣi.
S.FORM: tumuvux ku la ga mutux nha' sikaal sku navakis mha u halanay tikay i i pana'aring i sumi'atu' gi.
S.PHON: tumu*ux ku la ɣa mutux nħaʔ s~ɕikaal s~ɕku na*akis~ɕ mħa u ħalanaj tikaj i i panaʔariŋ i s~ɕumiʔatuʔ ɣi.
S.TRANSL: 要播種的時候,他們會向老人家說:「去開始祈福一下.」
Before sowing, they would say to the elders, saying "Go and begin to pray a little."

S.FORM: ini' mamu satuwi ga mutux mutux i niqun na kuwi ku a luvuqnia' ru mutux aqih ku tinuvuxan ma.
S.PHON: iniʔ mamu s~ɕatuwi ɣa mutux mutux i niqun na kuwi ku a lu*uqniaʔ ru mutux aqiħ ku tinu*uxan ma.
S.FORM: ini' mamu satuwi ga mutux mutux i niqun na kuwi ku a luvuqnia' ru mutux aqih ku tinuvuxan ma.
S.PHON: iniʔ mamu s~ɕatuwi ɣa mutux mutux i niqun na kuwi ku a lu*uqniaʔ ru mutux aqiħ ku tinu*uxan ma.
S.TRANSL: 如果你不祈福,蟲會吃他的嫩芽,然後播種會不好.
If you don't pray, worms will eat his sprouts and sowing will be bad.

S.FORM: sikaal nha' sku nangi' na qamisuan mha u hali i pasiqasu ru nanu' na naki 'i' valayq ku pintuwawan nha' la ma.
S.PHON: s~ɕikaal nħaʔ s~ɕku naŋiʔ na qamis~ɕuan mħa u ħali i pas~ɕiqas~ɕu ru nanuʔ na naki ʔiʔ *alajq ku pintuwawan nħaʔ la ma.
S.FORM: sikaal nha' sku nangi' na qamisuan mha u hali i pasiqasu ru nanu' na naki 'i' valayq ku pintuwawan nha' la ma.
S.PHON: s~ɕikaal nħaʔ s~ɕku naŋiʔ na qamis~ɕuan mħa u ħali i pas~ɕiqas~ɕu ru nanuʔ na naki ʔiʔ *alajq ku pintuwawan nħaʔ la ma.
S.TRANSL: 他們對一位兄長說:「去做第一次收成儀式.」這樣他們的作物才會好.
They say to an elder, "Go and perform the ceremony of first harvest," and then their crop would be good.

S.FORM: ru' vavawnia' la ga gi kumloh deshihou la ga pasay aring i kumloh la ga.
S.PHON: ruʔ *a*awniaʔ la ɣa ɣi kumloħ *es~ɕħiħou la ɣa pas~ɕaj ariŋ i kumloħ la ɣa.
S.FORM: ru' vavawnia' la ga gi kumloh deshihou la ga pasay aring i kumloh la ga.
S.PHON: ruʔ *a*awniaʔ la ɣa ɣi kumloħ *es~ɕħiħou la ɣa pas~ɕaj ariŋ i kumloħ la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 然後下次開始收成的時候.
And next time when beginning to harvest.

S.FORM: nanu' a mutux maglu ku yakiyaki' mha halayta' i kumloh gi valayq vay ku a tinvuxan ru valayq ku vuaynia'.
S.PHON: nanuʔ a mutux maɣlu ku jakijakiʔ mħa ħalajtaʔ i kumloħ ɣi *alajq *aj ku a tin*uxan ru *alajq ku *uajniaʔ.
S.FORM: nanu' a mutux maglu ku yakiyaki' mha halayta' i kumloh gi valayq vay ku a tinvuxan ru valayq ku vuaynia'.
S.PHON: nanuʔ a mutux maɣlu ku jakijakiʔ mħa ħalajtaʔ i kumloħ ɣi *alajq *aj ku a tin*uxan ru *alajq ku *uajniaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 年長婦女會結伴說:「我們一起去收割,因為作物很好,然後稻穗很好.」
Elderly women would come in groups and say, "Let's go and harvest, because the crop is good and its ear is good."

S.FORM: ru' musa' suvalay kumloh ku yakiyaki' ru.
S.PHON: ruʔ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕu*alaj kumloħ ku jakijakiʔ ru.
S.FORM: ru' musa' suvalay kumloh ku yakiyaki' ru.
S.PHON: ruʔ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕu*alaj kumloħ ku jakijakiʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 年長的婦女們就真的去收割.
And elderly women indeed go harvesting.

S.FORM: tiku tamalunghiya' ga ini' nha' pasapungi gi musa' qumvuwang su e vahut ini' ga musa' sumvu' su.
S.PHON: tiku tamaluŋħijaʔ ɣa iniʔ nħaʔ pas~ɕapuŋi ɣi mus~ɕaʔ qum*uwaŋ s~ɕu e *aħut iniʔ ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕum*uʔ s~ɕu.
S.FORM: tiku tamalunghiya' ga ini' nha' pasapungi gi musa' qumvuwang su e vahut ini' ga musa' sumvu' su.
S.PHON: tiku tamaluŋħijaʔ ɣa iniʔ nħaʔ pas~ɕapuŋi ɣi mus~ɕaʔ qum*uwaŋ s~ɕu e *aħut iniʔ ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕum*uʔ s~ɕu.
S.TRANSL: 至於男人,他們不參與,因為他們去獵松鼠,不然的話就是射熊.

TRANSL.notes: As for men, they do not let them participate, becaue (the men) go hunting squirrels, or if not, shooting bears.

S.TRANSL: As for men, they do not let them participate, becaue go hunting squirrels, or if not, shooting bears.

S.FORM: u ini' nha' pasapungi ku tamalung hiya' gi yaku kakanayrin ku lawkah.
S.PHON: u iniʔ nħaʔ pas~ɕapuŋi ku tamaluŋ ħijaʔ ɣi jaku kakanajrin ku lawkaħ.
S.FORM: u ini' nha' pasapungi ku tamalung hiya' gi yaku kakanayrin ku lawkah.
S.PHON: u iniʔ nħaʔ pas~ɕapuŋi ku tamaluŋ ħijaʔ ɣi jaku kakanajrin ku lawkaħ.
S.TRANSL: 他們不讓男人決定,因為這些女人很強勢.
They do not let men decide it, because these women are strong.

S.FORM: nanu' tiku a tinvuxan nha' yaku tamalung han ku musa' han i minang han ru naqaru' i minang la ga situ' nha' sku kakanayrin mha u a hali la i tumuvux ru.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tiku a tin*uxan nħaʔ jaku tamaluŋ ħan ku mus~ɕaʔ ħan i minaŋ ħan ru naqaruʔ i minaŋ la ɣa s~ɕituʔ nħaʔ s~ɕku kakanajrin mħa u a ħali la i tumu*ux ru.
S.FORM: nanu' tiku a tinvuxan nha' yaku tamalung han ku musa' han i minang han ru naqaru' i minang la ga situ' nha' sku kakanayrin mha u a hali la i tumuvux ru.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tiku a tin*uxan nħaʔ jaku tamaluŋ ħan ku mus~ɕaʔ ħan i minaŋ ħan ru naqaruʔ i minaŋ la ɣa s~ɕituʔ nħaʔ s~ɕku kakanajrin mħa u a ħali la i tumu*ux ru.
S.TRANSL: 這些男人先去開墾他們播種的地方.完成墾地後,他們叫女人們去播種.
These men go first and plow the place where they sow. After finishing plowing, they tell women to go and sow.

S.FORM: valayq vay ku tinuxanta' ru.
S.PHON: *alajq *aj ku tinuxantaʔ ru.
S.FORM: valayq vay ku tinuxanta' ru.
S.PHON: *alajq *aj ku tinuxantaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們的收成非常好.
Our crop is really good.

S.FORM: teri tasiaringta' i kumloh la ga nanu' a paqasawta' kaxavaw ma.
S.PHON: teri tas~ɕiariŋtaʔ i kumloħ la ɣa nanuʔ a paqas~ɕawtaʔ kaxa*aw ma.
S.FORM: teri tasiaringta' i kumloh la ga nanu' a paqasawta' kaxavaw ma.
S.PHON: teri tas~ɕiariŋtaʔ i kumloħ la ɣa nanuʔ a paqas~ɕawtaʔ kaxa*aw ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們開始收成,然後我們都很開心.
We start harvesting and then we are all happy.

S.FORM: ru musa' i kumloh vay ku nanavakis sunga' ga mutux nha' i halan i pasiaqsu' mha halaymian i a kumloh han ru.
S.PHON: ru mus~ɕaʔ i kumloħ *aj ku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa mutux nħaʔ i ħalan i pas~ɕiaqs~ɕuʔ mħa ħalajmian i a kumloħ ħan ru.
S.FORM: ru musa' i kumloh vay ku nanavakis sunga' ga mutux nha' i halan i pasiaqsu' mha halaymian i a kumloh han ru.
S.PHON: ru mus~ɕaʔ i kumloħ *aj ku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa mutux nħaʔ i ħalan i pas~ɕiaqs~ɕuʔ mħa ħalajmian i a kumloħ ħan ru.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)真的去收割,然後以前老人家他們會去做第一次收割儀式,說:「我們先收割.」

S.TRANSL: 真的去收割,然後以前老人家他們會去做第一次收割儀式,說:「我們先收割.」

TRANSL.notes: (They) really go harvesting, and in the past the elders would go and perform the ceremony of first harvest, and say "Let's go harvesting first."

S.TRANSL: really go harvesting, and in the past the elders would go and perform the ceremony of first harvest, and say "Let's go harvesting first."

S.FORM: tiku tina'aring nha' i kumloh mutux nha' pugian ru gi.
S.PHON: tiku tinaʔariŋ nħaʔ i kumloħ mutux nħaʔ puɣian ru ɣi.
S.FORM: tiku tina'aring nha' i kumloh mutux nha' pugian ru gi.
S.PHON: tiku tinaʔariŋ nħaʔ i kumloħ mutux nħaʔ puɣian ru ɣi.
S.TRANSL: 他們會日曬第一批收成.
They will sundry their first collection of harvest.

S.FORM: marngu' la ga nanu' suxuunnha' cku' luhiun gi vali kia' a' kikay sunga.
S.PHON: marŋuʔ la ɣa nanuʔ s~ɕuxuunnħaʔ ʦ~ʨkuʔ luħiun ɣi *ali kiaʔ aʔ kikaj s~ɕuŋa.
S.FORM: marngu' la ga nanu' suxuunnha' cku' luhiun gi vali kia' a' kikay sunga.
S.PHON: marŋuʔ la ɣa nanuʔ s~ɕuxuunnħaʔ ʦ~ʨkuʔ luħiun ɣi *ali kiaʔ aʔ kikaj s~ɕuŋa.

TRANSL.notes: (收成)乾了之後,他們會用臼來搗小米,因為以前沒有機器.

S.TRANSL: 乾了之後,他們會用臼來搗小米,因為以前沒有機器.

TRANSL.notes: After (the harvest) is dried, they would thresh millet with a mortar, because there was no machine in the past.

S.TRANSL: After is dried, they would thresh millet with a mortar, because there was no machine in the past.

S.FORM: suxuunnha' ru i matavavuax la ga sa ivuwi la u taviqawta' la.
S.PHON: s~ɕuxuunnħaʔ ru i mata*a*uax la ɣa s~ɕa i*uwi la u ta*iqawtaʔ la.
S.FORM: suxuunnha' ru i matavavuax la ga sa ivuwi la u taviqawta' la.
S.PHON: s~ɕuxuunnħaʔ ru i mata*a*uax la ɣa s~ɕa i*uwi la u ta*iqawtaʔ la.

TRANSL.notes: 他們搗米,然後(種子)變成米粒之後,(他們)說:「我們來搗麻糬.」

S.TRANSL: 他們搗米,然後 變成米粒之後, 說:「我們來搗麻糬.」

TRANSL.notes: They thresh and after (the seeds) become white millet, (they) say, "Let's thresh mochi."

S.TRANSL: They thresh and after become white millet, say, "Let's thresh mochi."

S.FORM: tumaviq ru mutux nha' i galgan manuvuaw mutux i kavalay su uwi su quwaw na itaal mha u tiku quwaw na itaal hani kavalayawniam ru.
S.PHON: tuma*iq ru mutux nħaʔ i ɣalɣan manu*uaw mutux i ka*alaj s~ɕu uwi s~ɕu quwaw na itaal mħa u tiku quwaw na itaal ħani ka*alajawniam ru.
S.FORM: tumaviq ru mutux nha' i galgan manuvuaw mutux i kavalay su uwi su quwaw na itaal mha u tiku quwaw na itaal hani kavalayawniam ru.
S.PHON: tuma*iq ru mutux nħaʔ i ɣalɣan manu*uaw mutux i ka*alaj s~ɕu uwi s~ɕu quwaw na itaal mħa u tiku quwaw na itaal ħani ka*alajawniam ru.
S.TRANSL: 他們會邊搗邊喝泰雅人的酒,說:「我們來做這個泰雅人的酒.」
They would thresh and drink along the wine of the Atayal people, saying, "Let's make this wine of Atayal."

S.FORM: a asiki kumlohta' la ru i tumaviqta' la ga navuawta' kia la ma ku.
S.PHON: a as~ɕiki kumloħtaʔ la ru i tuma*iqtaʔ la ɣa na*uawtaʔ kia la ma ku.
S.FORM: a asiki kumlohta' la ru i tumaviqta' la ga navuawta' kia la ma ku.
S.PHON: a as~ɕiki kumloħtaʔ la ru i tuma*iqtaʔ la ɣa na*uawtaʔ kia la ma ku.
S.TRANSL: 我們必須要收成,然後搗米,然後那時候說:「我們來喝酒!」
We must harvest, and thresh, and say, "Let's drink!" at that time.

S.FORM: a qamisuwan sunga' vaq i matawaw na a ragiax nha' gi talahani gi vali kia a a slaqnha' nanak ku tumuvux ku vaqunnha'.
S.PHON: a qamis~ɕuwan s~ɕuŋaʔ *aq i matawaw na a raɣiax nħaʔ ɣi talaħani ɣi *ali kia a a s~ɕlaqnħaʔ nanak ku tumu*ux ku *aqunnħaʔ.
S.FORM: a qamisuwan sunga' vaq i matawaw na a ragiax nha' gi talahani gi vali kia a a slaqnha' nanak ku tumuvux ku vaqunnha'.
S.PHON: a qamis~ɕuwan s~ɕuŋaʔ *aq i matawaw na a raɣiax nħaʔ ɣi talaħani ɣi *ali kia a a s~ɕlaqnħaʔ nanak ku tumu*ux ku *aqunnħaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 兄長以前他們知道在山裡耕作,因為(他們)習慣,因為他們沒有自己的地.他們只知道(在山上)種植小米.

S.TRANSL: 兄長以前他們知道在山裡耕作,因為 習慣,因為他們沒有自己的地.他們只知道 種植小米.

TRANSL.notes: The elders in the past, they knew farming in the mountains, because (they were) used to it and their were no fields of theirs. They only knew sowing (in the mountains).

S.TRANSL: The elders in the past, they knew farming in the mountains, because used to it and their were no fields of theirs. They only knew sowing .

S.FORM: nanu' yani ku misa na hiya' ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ jani ku mis~ɕa na ħijaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: nanu' yani ku misa na hiya' ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ jani ku mis~ɕa na ħijaʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 這個事件就是那樣.
That is the thing.

S.FORM: i nanu' u nanu' i tumaviq la ga mutux i muah kaxavaw ku gelugelunha' i.
S.PHON: i nanuʔ u nanuʔ i tuma*iq la ɣa mutux i muaħ kaxa*aw ku ɣeluɣelunħaʔ i.
S.FORM: i nanu' u nanu' i tumaviq la ga mutux i muah kaxavaw ku gelugelunha' i.
S.PHON: i nanuʔ u nanuʔ i tuma*iq la ɣa mutux i muaħ kaxa*aw ku ɣeluɣelunħaʔ i.
S.TRANSL: 就是,搗米的時候他們全部的親戚都會來.
When threshing rice, their relatives will all come.

S.FORM: nha' gi paqasunnha' maniq kaxavaw ku a' minuwah sku mamayah ka tinuvuxnha'.
S.PHON: nħaʔ ɣi paqas~ɕunnħaʔ maniq kaxa*aw ku aʔ minuwaħ s~ɕku mamajaħ ka tinu*uxnħaʔ.
S.FORM: nha' gi paqasunnha' maniq kaxavaw ku a' minuwah sku mamayah ka tinuvuxnha'.
S.PHON: nħaʔ ɣi paqas~ɕunnħaʔ maniq kaxa*aw ku aʔ minuwaħ s~ɕku mamajaħ ka tinu*uxnħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 因為他們都很高興可以吃從他們所播種的旱地種來的東西.
Because they are all happy to eat what comes from the dry land they sowed.

S.FORM: ru i ki'i muvusinuk la ga mutux nha' i i paqahagan mha u asiki giniun ku matawwaw ga nanu' u pakakiya ku naniqunta' mha ku a pinkalan nku nanavakis.
S.PHON: ru i kiʔi mu*us~ɕinuk la ɣa mutux nħaʔ i i paqaħaɣan mħa u as~ɕiki ɣiniun ku matawwaw ɣa nanuʔ u pakakija ku naniquntaʔ mħa ku a pinkalan nku nana*akis~ɕ.
S.FORM: ru i ki'i muvusinuk la ga mutux nha' i i paqahagan mha u asiki giniun ku matawwaw ga nanu' u pakakiya ku naniqunta' mha ku a pinkalan nku nanavakis.
S.PHON: ru i kiʔi mu*us~ɕinuk la ɣa mutux nħaʔ i i paqaħaɣan mħa u as~ɕiki ɣiniun ku matawwaw ɣa nanuʔ u pakakija ku naniquntaʔ mħa ku a pinkalan nku nana*akis~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 然後當他們醉了,他們大概會爭執,說:「工作一定要這樣做,才會有食物.」這是長老們的共識.
And when they are drunk, they would probably argue, saying "The work must be done this way, so that we can have food," which is what the elders agreed.

S.FORM: ita' ka gitay sku hani la ga ini' paska' la.
S.PHON: itaʔ ka ɣitaj s~ɕku ħani la ɣa iniʔ pas~ɕkaʔ la.
S.FORM: ita' ka gitay sku hani la ga ini' paska' la.
S.PHON: itaʔ ka ɣitaj s~ɕku ħani la ɣa iniʔ pas~ɕkaʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 我們這個時代不一樣了.
Our times now is not the same.

S.FORM: gi jitay sku hani la ga kia la ku a pasahuan i hugal ru.
S.PHON: ɣi jitaj s~ɕku ħani la ɣa kia la ku a pas~ɕaħuan i ħuɣal ru.
S.FORM: gi jitay sku hani la ga kia la ku a pasahuan i hugal ru.
S.PHON: ɣi jitaj s~ɕku ħani la ɣa kia la ku a pas~ɕaħuan i ħuɣal ru.
S.TRANSL: 在現在,山下有碾米廠.
In present times, there are grinding mills at the bottom of mountain.

S.FORM: mutux asi usa' gumriax la gi yani a ini' kanga'.
S.PHON: mutux as~ɕi us~ɕaʔ ɣumriax la ɣi jani a iniʔ kaŋaʔ.
S.FORM: mutux asi usa' gumriax la gi yani a ini' kanga'.
S.PHON: mutux as~ɕi us~ɕaʔ ɣumriax la ɣi jani a iniʔ kaŋaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (我們)會直接去買米,因為這樣很快.

S.TRANSL: 會直接去買米,因為這樣很快.

TRANSL.notes: (We) will just go and buy rice, because it is fast.

S.TRANSL: will just go and buy rice, because it is fast.

S.FORM: sunga' hiya' sku ukas a a gariaxan kiga asi inuqin nanak i matawwaw a naniqunnha' gi ini' patawaw ga ru yani a pa'inuqin la gi ukas la ku naniqunnha' la.
S.PHON: s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ s~ɕku ukas~ɕ a a ɣariaxan kiɣa as~ɕi inuqin nanak i matawwaw a naniqunnħaʔ ɣi iniʔ patawaw ɣa ru jani a paʔinuqin la ɣi ukas~ɕ la ku naniqunnħaʔ la.
S.FORM: sunga' hiya' sku ukas a a gariaxan kiga asi inuqin nanak i matawwaw a naniqunnha' gi ini' patawaw ga ru yani a pa'inuqin la gi ukas la ku naniqunnha' la.
S.PHON: s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ s~ɕku ukas~ɕ a a ɣariaxan kiɣa as~ɕi inuqin nanak i matawwaw a naniqunnħaʔ ɣi iniʔ patawaw ɣa ru jani a paʔinuqin la ɣi ukas~ɕ la ku naniqunnħaʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 過去沒有米店的話,就要死命投入在找食物的工作上,因為沒有工作,他們就會死於沒有食物.
In the past, there was no rice store, so they worked desperately for their food, because if they did not work, they would die from not having food.

S.FORM: tiku salun mha sumi'atu' hani ga mutux nha' i i sumi'atu' su papanangunnha'.
S.PHON: tiku s~ɕalun mħa s~ɕumiʔatuʔ ħani ɣa mutux nħaʔ i i s~ɕumiʔatuʔ s~ɕu papanaŋunnħaʔ.
S.FORM: tiku salun mha sumi'atu' hani ga mutux nha' i i sumi'atu' su papanangunnha'.
S.PHON: tiku s~ɕalun mħa s~ɕumiʔatuʔ ħani ɣa mutux nħaʔ i i s~ɕumiʔatuʔ s~ɕu papanaŋunnħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 所謂的這個祈福儀式,就是他們會劃定將開墾的土地的界線.
The so-called praying ceremony means that they will delimit the boundaries of the land they are going to plow.

W.TRANSL: Ca重疊-非實現-墾地-受焦=3PL.屬格

S.FORM: halannha' i tumuvux tumuvux ru hi'annha' su quwaw ku a rauq naki i valayq ku pintuwawanta' mha.
S.PHON: ħalannħaʔ i tumu*ux tumu*ux ru ħiʔannħaʔ s~ɕu quwaw ku a rauq naki i *alajq ku pintuwawantaʔ mħa.
S.FORM: halannha' i tumuvux tumuvux ru hi'annha' su quwaw ku a rauq naki i valayq ku pintuwawanta' mha.
S.PHON: ħalannħaʔ i tumu*ux tumu*ux ru ħiʔannħaʔ s~ɕu quwaw ku a rauq naki i *alajq ku pintuwawantaʔ mħa.
S.TRANSL: 他們去播種,然後倒酒在地上,說:「這樣我們的農作才會好.」
They go sowing and spill wine on the ground, saying "so that our crop will be good."

S.FORM: e musa' i anananu' ku wawnha' ga yaku utux ku pasapungun nha'.
S.PHON: e mus~ɕaʔ i anananuʔ ku wawnħaʔ ɣa jaku utux ku pas~ɕapuŋun nħaʔ.
S.FORM: e musa' i anananu' ku wawnha' ga yaku utux ku pasapungun nha'.
S.PHON: e mus~ɕaʔ i anananuʔ ku wawnħaʔ ɣa jaku utux ku pas~ɕapuŋun nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 不管任何事就是上帝替他們決定.
Whatever matter of theirs, this God makes the decision for them.

S.FORM: ini' na' u a sahuqi ku utux hiya' gi nanu' a yaku utux ku sumpung sku wawawta' ka itaal mha.
S.PHON: iniʔ naʔ u a s~ɕaħuqi ku utux ħijaʔ ɣi nanuʔ a jaku utux ku s~ɕumpuŋ s~ɕku wawawtaʔ ka itaal mħa.
S.FORM: ini' na' u a sahuqi ku utux hiya' gi nanu' a yaku utux ku sumpung sku wawawta' ka itaal mha.
S.PHON: iniʔ naʔ u a s~ɕaħuqi ku utux ħijaʔ ɣi nanuʔ a jaku utux ku s~ɕumpuŋ s~ɕku wawawtaʔ ka itaal mħa.
S.TRANSL: 他們不會漏掉上帝,因為他們說:「上帝做主我們人所有的事情.」
They do not miss God, because they say, "This God decides everything of ours."

S.FORM: maniq su nanu' i sukuunnha' i sasukuunnha' sku kahu' ku kinlohnha' la ga mutux nha' i kun vali niqan su naqiya' gi.
S.PHON: maniq s~ɕu nanuʔ i s~ɕukuunnħaʔ i s~ɕas~ɕukuunnħaʔ s~ɕku kaħuʔ ku kinloħnħaʔ la ɣa mutux nħaʔ i kun *ali niqan s~ɕu naqijaʔ ɣi.
S.FORM: maniq su nanu' i sukuunnha' i sasukuunnha' sku kahu' ku kinlohnha' la ga mutux nha' i kun vali niqan su naqiya' gi.
S.PHON: maniq s~ɕu nanuʔ i s~ɕukuunnħaʔ i s~ɕas~ɕukuunnħaʔ s~ɕku kaħuʔ ku kinloħnħaʔ la ɣa mutux nħaʔ i kun *ali niqan s~ɕu naqijaʔ ɣi.
S.TRANSL: 他們的收成要放進穀倉的時候,他們會吃第一部分.
When they are going to put the crops into the barn, they will eat the first portion.

S.FORM: ki'i mha talamayta' ku pintuwawanta' talayta' kinvalaq mha ru.
S.PHON: kiʔi mħa talamajtaʔ ku pintuwawantaʔ talajtaʔ kin*alaq mħa ru.
S.FORM: ki'i mha talamayta' ku pintuwawanta' talayta' kinvalaq mha ru.
S.PHON: kiʔi mħa talamajtaʔ ku pintuwawantaʔ talajtaʔ kin*alaq mħa ru.
S.TRANSL: 可能他們想:「我們嘗嚐試看看,看收成有多好.」
Probably they think, "Let's try our crop and see how good it is."

W.TRANSL: 耕作<完成>耕作-處焦=1IPL.屬格

S.FORM: tiku siyawnha' kinaniqannha' la ga sukuunnha' kahu' la ru.
S.PHON: tiku s~ɕijawnħaʔ kinaniqannħaʔ la ɣa s~ɕukuunnħaʔ kaħuʔ la ru.
S.FORM: tiku siyawnha' kinaniqannha' la ga sukuunnha' kahu' la ru.
S.PHON: tiku s~ɕijawnħaʔ kinaniqannħaʔ la ɣa s~ɕukuunnħaʔ kaħuʔ la ru.
S.TRANSL: 他們吃剩下的,他們會放到穀倉.
The rest of their eating, they will put it in the barn.

S.FORM: pasxu' la ga halannha' paqutuqutux magal ku qagu' la ru suxuunnha' na qsu' la.
S.PHON: pas~ɕxuʔ la ɣa ħalannħaʔ paqutuqutux maɣal ku qaɣuʔ la ru s~ɕuxuunnħaʔ na qs~ɕuʔ la.
S.FORM: pasxu' la ga halannha' paqutuqutux magal ku qagu' la ru suxuunnha' na qsu' la.
S.PHON: pas~ɕxuʔ la ɣa ħalannħaʔ paqutuqutux maɣal ku qaɣuʔ la ru s~ɕuxuunnħaʔ na qs~ɕuʔ la.

TRANSL.notes: 要搗米的話,他們去一把一把拿(作物),然後他們就用杵來搗米.

S.TRANSL: 要搗米的話,他們去一把一把拿 ,然後他們就用杵來搗米.

TRANSL.notes: When they thresh rice, they go to take (the crop) by bundles one after another, and they thresh with a pestle.

S.TRANSL: When they thresh rice, they go to take by bundles one after another, and they thresh with a pestle.

S.FORM: i musa' tal su a nanu sinku'nha' ru i.
S.PHON: i mus~ɕaʔ tal s~ɕu a nanu s~ɕinkuʔnħaʔ ru i.
S.FORM: i musa' tal su a nanu sinku'nha' ru i.
S.PHON: i mus~ɕaʔ tal s~ɕu a nanu s~ɕinkuʔnħaʔ ru i.
S.TRANSL: 去看他們設的陷阱.
Go and see the trap they set up.

S.FORM: musa' sumi'atu' uwi ga mutux humakay su raniq humakay na kukuy musa' i sku mamayahnha' ru.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕumiʔatuʔ uwi ɣa mutux ħumakaj s~ɕu raniq ħumakaj na kukuj mus~ɕaʔ i s~ɕku mamajaħnħaʔ ru.
S.FORM: musa' sumi'atu' uwi ga mutux humakay su raniq humakay na kukuy musa' i sku mamayahnha' ru.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕumiʔatuʔ uwi ɣa mutux ħumakaj s~ɕu raniq ħumakaj na kukuj mus~ɕaʔ i s~ɕku mamajaħnħaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 他們去行使劃地儀式的時候,他們走去他們的旱田.
When they go and perform the land delineation ceremony, they walk on foot on the road to their dry land.

S.FORM: unial ku sisiliq siik ma i tagi makaraya' ru arua tagi hugal ga nanu' u valayq mha ru.
S.PHON: unial ku s~ɕis~ɕiliq s~ɕiik ma i taɣi makarajaʔ ru arua taɣi ħuɣal ɣa nanuʔ u *alajq mħa ru.
S.FORM: unial ku sisiliq siik ma i tagi makaraya' ru arua tagi hugal ga nanu' u valayq mha ru.
S.PHON: unial ku s~ɕis~ɕiliq s~ɕiik ma i taɣi makarajaʔ ru arua taɣi ħuɣal ɣa nanuʔ u *alajq mħa ru.

TRANSL.notes: 西西利鳥吱吱喳喳飛過,從上往下飛.這個(徵兆)很好.

S.TRANSL: 西西利鳥吱吱喳喳飛過,從上往下飛.這個 很好.

TRANSL.notes: The sisiliq bird comes chirping. It goes down from high above. This (sign) is good.

S.TRANSL: The sisiliq bird comes chirping. It goes down from high above. This is good.

S.FORM: kasiyuk XXXX maki i yahu' raniq ru siik ma ru arua tigi makaraya' ga.
S.PHON: kas~ɕijuk xxxx maki i jaħuʔ raniq ru s~ɕiik ma ru arua tiɣi makarajaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: kasiyuk XXXX maki i yahu' raniq ru siik ma ru arua tigi makaraya' ga.
S.PHON: kas~ɕijuk xxxx maki i jaħuʔ raniq ru s~ɕiik ma ru arua tiɣi makarajaʔ ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: (鳥)在路下吱吱喳喳,往上面飛去.

S.TRANSL: 在路下吱吱喳喳,往上面飛去.

TRANSL.notes: (The bird) chirps at the end of the road, and flies to the top.

S.TRANSL: chirps at the end of the road, and flies to the top.

S.FORM: nanu' aqu suvalay s mahuay vay ku utux ka nanu' a sumiwal la mha ku.
S.PHON: nanuʔ aqu s~ɕu*alaj s~ɕ maħuaj *aj ku utux ka nanuʔ a s~ɕumiwal la mħa ku.
S.FORM: nanu' aqu suvalay s mahuay vay ku utux ka nanu' a sumiwal la mha ku.
S.PHON: nanuʔ aqu s~ɕu*alaj s~ɕ maħuaj *aj ku utux ka nanuʔ a s~ɕumiwal la mħa ku.
S.TRANSL: 原來是真的.非常感謝神已經答應了.
This should be real. Thank God very much for permission.

S.FORM: u inlungannha' i ini' usa' ini' ku ini' tali ku kavahniq ki ga a aqih ku musa' aqih ku hinakayta' ru musa' aqih ku pintuwawanta' mha.
S.PHON: u inluŋannħaʔ i iniʔ us~ɕaʔ iniʔ ku iniʔ tali ku ka*aħniq ki ɣa a aqiħ ku mus~ɕaʔ aqiħ ku ħinakajtaʔ ru mus~ɕaʔ aqiħ ku pintuwawantaʔ mħa.
S.FORM: u inlungannha' i ini' usa' ini' ku ini' tali ku kavahniq ki ga a aqih ku musa' aqih ku hinakayta' ru musa' aqih ku pintuwawanta' mha.
S.PHON: u inluŋannħaʔ i iniʔ us~ɕaʔ iniʔ ku iniʔ tali ku ka*aħniq ki ɣa a aqiħ ku mus~ɕaʔ aqiħ ku ħinakajtaʔ ru mus~ɕaʔ aqiħ ku pintuwawantaʔ mħa.
S.TRANSL: 沒有看到小鳥的話走的過程會不好,耕種的作物會不好.

TRANSL.notes: They think, "If (we) do not see the bird, our walking wwouild be bad, and crop would be bad"

S.TRANSL: They think, "If do not see the bird, our walking wwouild be bad, and crop would be bad"
